creator: jeff-ml@mountin.net
text:
At 03:37 PM 6/8/01 -0500, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
>I think this patch goes to apache, but its so outdated, can it be closed or
>have an updated patch submitted to it?

The last time the mirrors were updated for a slight directory change for 
the mirrors, the person doing the work didn't check them.  Gave up at that 
point.

However, I'll recheck the sites, then update it and make one for every 
Apache port, as most share several long dead mirrors.


Jeff Mountin - jeff@mountin.net
Systems/Network Administrator
FreeBSD - the power to serve
